title: Create Items From Gantt
excerpt: Gantt charts are a very helpful tool, but currently it is more of a visual aid than a fully interactive way to use Monday for task management. I’d like to be able to create new items while in Gantt view so I can continue…

posts.author: nsmall (Nolan Small)
posts.cookedHtml: Gantt charts are a very helpful tool, but currently it is more of a visual aid than a fully interactive way to use Monday for task management. I’d like to be able to create new items while in Gantt view so I can continue refining project scope and dependencies without having to go back to the main board to add items and come back to Gantt multiple times.
